Off Calendar Mar-06-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER SPECIALIZED BICYCLE COMPONENTS INC's Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Off calendar. This petition was superseded by the amended petition to confirm arbitration award.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR#5976, ssawyer@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Amended Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-06-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER SPECIALIZED BICYCLE COMPONENTS INC's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Petitioner Specialized Bicycle Components, Inc.'s petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed.

Order & Judgment signed.
